nasb.text: But if He should say thus, ‘I have no delight in you,’ behold, here I am, let Him do to me as seems good to Him.”

esv.text: But if he says, ‘I have no pleasure in you,’ behold, here I am, let him do to me what seems good to him.”

cnv.text: 他若是說：‘我不喜悅你。’看哪！我就在這裡，他看怎樣好，就怎樣對待我吧！”

ccb.text: 但如果我使祂不悦，我也甘愿听凭祂的处置。
